title: Brown Monogram Shoulder Bag
description: This shoulder bag features a repeating monogram pattern and a saddle-style flap with a horsebit accent. It has a brown adjustable strap and brown leather trim.

title: Monogram Speedy Nano
description: A classic, small brown monogram canvas Speedy bag with tan leather trim and straps. It features gold-toned hardware and a detachable strap.
